_instructions: Fill in what you can find in the paper. Use null for fields not reported. Add confidence: HIGH (explicitly stated), MEDIUM (inferred from context/figures), LOW (ambiguous/estimated).

formulations._note: One entry per DISTINCT formulation tested. If the paper tests 5 different LNPs, create 5 entries.

ionizable_lipid.name: e.g. MC3, DLin-MC3-DMA, C12-200, SM-102, ALC-0315, or 'proprietary'
ionizable_lipid._tip: SMILES is rarely in the paper. Check supplementary. If not available, use null.

targeting.target_receptor: CD117 | CD45 | CD34 | CD46 | none | other
targeting.antibody_clone: e.g. 2B8, ACK2, or null if not antibody-targeted

confidence._tip: Rate your confidence in the formulation data above
confidence.notes: e.g. 'molar ratios not explicitly stated, inferred from methods section'

experiments._note: One entry per distinct experiment. Link to the formulation by name.
experiments.formulation_name: must match a name from formulations array above

payload.type: mRNA | siRNA | sgRNA | RNP | base_editor | prime_editor | Cre_mRNA | DNA_barcode
payload.specific_cargo: e.g. Cre recombinase mRNA, ABE8e + sgRNA targeting BCL11A, siCD45, GFP mRNA

model.strain: e.g. C57BL/6, Ai14, NBSGW humanized, Rhesus macaque
model.cell_line: e.g. EML, K562, HeLa, primary CD34+, or null if in vivo

efficacy._tip: Record ALL efficacy metrics reported. Use the fields that apply.
efficacy.hsc_definition: e.g. LSK, CD34+CD38-, LT-HSC (LSK CD150+CD48-), Lin-Sca1+cKit+
efficacy.editing_method: e.g. flow cytometry (GFP+), flow cytometry (TdTomato+), amplicon sequencing (indel%), qPCR

biodistribution._tip: Record organ-level delivery data if available. This is CRITICAL for our model.
biodistribution.measurement_method: e.g. IVIS bioluminescence, flow cytometry TdTomato+, luciferase activity

blood_disorder_data._note: Only fill if the paper specifically targets a blood disorder
blood_disorder_data.disease_target: beta_thal | SCD | alpha_thal | SCID | fanconi_anemia | other | null
blood_disorder_data.genetic_target: e.g. HBB, BCL11A, HBG1/2 promoter, KLKB1, or null
blood_disorder_data.editing_strategy: base_editing | HDR | NHEJ | gene_addition | gene_silencing | null

key_findings_for_ml._tip: Free-text notes on what's most relevant for our ML model
key_findings_for_ml.data_quality_notes: e.g. 'small n=2 for dose group, results from single experiment'

label_for_ml._tip: Our harmonized classification label for ML training
label_for_ml.primary_metric_used: e.g. TdTomato+ in LT-HSC by flow cytometry
